name: Phantom Lancer
description: We outnumbered you. We outnumber them all! Azwraith, the Phantom Lancer.

abilities.name: Illusory Armaments
abilities.description: Azwraith's illusion has a min illusion damage dealt factor corresponding to the hero's attack damage value upon creation, for a duration.

abilities.name: Spirit Lance
abilities.description: Sends a magical spirit lance to a target enemy unit that damages and slows its movement speed.

abilities.name: Doppelganger
abilities.description: Nummer Eins deals no damage and does not receive additional incoming damage. This illusion's duration is not extended. Nummer Zwei deals a portion of Phantom Lancer's damage and receive additional incoming damage. This illusion's duration is not extended.

abilities.name: Phantom Rush
abilities.description: Grants Azwraith and his illusions both haste and phase movement upon proc. Creates Juxtapose-based illusions that automatically attacks the enemy units Azwraith rushes through. Additionally creates an illusion after a certain distance is rushed.

abilities.name: Juxtapose
abilities.description: Has a chance to create an illusion of himself per attack.
